_instructions: After FIFA publishes final 26-player lists, replace each empty array with official players. Format example: [{"name":"Player Name","position":"Forward","stars":5}]. Keep file named wc26-official-squads.json beside the HTML file.
_status: Updated with user-provided released squads as of 01 June 2026. Clubs omitted. Stars are subjective prediction/display ratings, not official FIFA ratings.
_rating_note: Stars are subjective 1–5 quality/form tiers for prediction help, not official FIFA ratings. Clubs were deliberately omitted to match the HTML structure.
